description: The SliderMemberEditor is commonly used in inspectors and can be used for Ref hacking.

fields.Continuous: Whether slider values should be constantly changed every frame update.
fields._path: The value underneath the target element to change. path elements are separated by ".".
fields._slider: The slider to trigger change events this component should use to influence ``_target``
fields._sliderValue: The value to be used for changing ``_target``
fields._textEditor: The text editor to change ``_target`` as a number text field.
